arts.ttl: Friday’s briefing: Man Utd, Tottenham and Rangers secure Europa League progress
arts.sum: Bruno Fernandes’ hat-trick helped United beat Real Sociedad 4-1, while Friday will see new England boss Thomas Tuchel name his first squad.

arts.ttl: 'I will just keep doing it' - Patrick Dorgu makes promise to Manchester United teammates
arts.sum: Patrick Dorgu produced another eye-catching showing in Man United's 4-1 Europa League victory over Real Sociedad at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: What Casemiro changed to regain Manchester United place and what Joshua Zirkzee must improve
arts.sum: Casemiro has regained form of late for Man United and received a standing ovation against Real Sociedad.

arts.ttl: Ruben says Dorgu did 'the right thing'
arts.sum: "I felt, during the week, that we showed we can play these kind of games and I think our exhibition against Arsenal was not beautiful, but it helped a lot and, in that second half, we needed to believe. I felt like Joshua Zirkzee has his best game for United, I do not know if you agree, but in that number-10 role it maybe seems to unleash what he can do with the ball in and out of possession.

arts.ttl: Fernandes sparks Manchester United as Europa League hopes continue
arts.sum: Bruno Fernandes showed his quality as Manchester United captain, as he continues to play a crucial part in the Europa League for Ruben Amorim's team.

arts.ttl: Hits and misses: Amorim relief as Man Utd's season remains alive
arts.sum: The Sky Sports football writers analyse Thursday's Europa League and Conference League action as all four British clubs progress to quarter-final ties.

arts.ttl: Jose Mourinho shows his class with ex-Manchester United stars after dramatic Europa League exit
arts.sum: Former Manchester United boss Jose Mourinho saw his Fenerbahce side bow out of the Europa League

arts.ttl: Amorim: We 'need to help' Fernandes win titles
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has said Manchester United "need to help" Bruno Fernandes win trophies after the Portuguese midfielder scored a hat trick to earn a place in the last eight of the Europa League.

arts.ttl: Manchester United must win titles for Bruno Fernandes, says Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: United in Europa League last eight after beating Sociedad ‘We need to help him win titles because he deserves this’ Ruben Amorim praised Bruno Fernandes’s hat-trick performance that swept Real Sociedad aside and took Manchester United into the Europa League quarter-finals, saying his side “needs to win titles” for the captain. After Mikel Oyarzabal struck first via an early penalty, United dominated, Fernandes scoring two from the spot on 16 and 50 minutes, before a superb late strike to complete the hat-trick. Diogo Dalot’s added-time fourth sealed progress. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes gives backing to Rasmus Hojlund after Man United striker's drought continues in Real Sociedad victory as captain says he is 'sure the goals will come'
arts.sum: Bruno Fernandes is confident that the goals will come for Rasmus Hojlund if he continues to work as hard for the team as he did on Thursday night.
